name: Baked Ham Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Fully Cooked Ham, Chopped Fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Wash and drain mushrooms. Remove stems and set caps aside.
3. Chop stems (about 1 cup for 24 appetizers). Cook chopped stems with green onions in butter until tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in flour, savory, and pepper. Add wine and water. Cook until thickened and bubbly.
5. Stir in ham and Parmesan. Fill mushroom caps with the ham mixture.
6. Place filled caps in a baking pan. Top with bread crumbs.
7. Bake until tender (15-20 minutes).
